languages.text: "Я приш{mf|ел|ла} за реликвией, принадлежащей моему роду, и не уйду без нее".
"I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."
languages.original_text: "Я приш{mf|ел|ла} за реликвией, принадлежащей моему роду, и не уйду без нее".

traits.locale_text: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."
"I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."
"I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."
"Warriors of the Imperium are languishing in captivity here. It is my duty to free them."

languages.text: 「帝国の戦士たちはここに囚われ、苦しんでいる。彼らを解放するのは私の義務だ」
languages.original_text: "Imperium warriors are languishing in captivity here. It is my duty to free them."

traits.locale_text: 「帝国の戦士たちはここに囚われ、苦しんでいる。彼らを解放するのは私の義務だ。」

languages.text: «He venido a por la reliquia que pertenece a mi dinastía y no me iré sin ella».
languages.original_text: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."

traits.locale_text: «He venido a por la reliquia que pertenece a mi dinastía y no me iré sin ella».

languages.text: “我来这里，是为了取回王朝圣物，不拿到手我绝不离开。”
languages.original_text: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."

traits.locale_text: “我来这里，是为了取回王朝圣物，不拿到手我绝不离开。”

languages.text: "Ich bin wegen des Reliktes hier, das meiner Dynastie gehört, und werde nicht ohne es gehen."
languages.original_text: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin wegen des Reliktes hier, das meiner Dynastie gehört, und werde nicht ohne es gehen."

languages.text: "Hanedanlığıma ait olan yadigârı almaya geldim. Onsuz gitmeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanlığıma ait olan yadigârı almaya geldim. Onsuz gitmeyeceğim."

languages.text: « Je viens récupérer une relique appartenant à ma dynastie, et je ne partirai pas sans elle. »
languages.original_text: "I have come for the relic that belongs to my dynasty, and I will not leave without it."

traits.locale_text: « Je viens récupérer une relique appartenant à ma dynastie, et je ne partirai pas sans elle. »
